Hi, it's David Deutsch and I'm really excited today to give you a breakdown of a Magalog promotion that I did for boardroom, which is now bottom line publications And it's for a book called Healing Remedies by two sisters, two very colorful sisters known as the Weiland sisters and they They specialize in kind of household type things Household remedies things you could find in your kitchen cabinets or refrigerator for healing Everything from herbs to chicken soup kinds of things and They They wrote a book which has a just a wonderful assortment of ways to you know prevent Heal all sorts of ailments and even diseases So that's what's being promoted in this Magalog the offer is a soft offer Which means that you send for the book and it will be sent to you. You don't have to send any money and Of course, that makes pay up a consideration. You don't want to over promise too much or People won't pay when the time comes to pay when boardroom sends the bill in a month or however, however that takes so it's a great offer and Let's see what it looks like I'll share the screen with you here Now again, this is a Magalog but Maybe you don't do Magalogs you probably don't But I still think there's so much to be learned from the techniques used in Magalogs You know the techniques of curiosity the techniques of of getting and keeping attention This the salesmanship techniques the copy techniques the storytelling techniques. So Even if you don't do Magalogs, I think it's Try to listen really for the things that you can take away and learn from it And if you don't do Magalogs if you don't do direct mail It's something you probably ought to consider because now more than ever direct mail is just a great way to You know to get to people It scales much better than the internet It people People pay attention out of what's in their mailboxes Because not as many people are using direct mail and of course a lot of people are home at this particular time So there they kind of look forward to getting the mail Okay, so let's get the hand here so I can point to things pretend that that hand has a little pointer on it That's pointing to certain things like This is The headline on the cover how Jin soak raisins cured Carmen's hopeless arthritis So one of the ways one of the headlines that That can be used and again, this is true of a Magalog. It's true of a True of an online sales letter or whatever could use a a More general headline that you know Thousands of great cures in this book or you know 100,000 ways to you know cures what else you with what's in your kitchen And I think that was actually one of the things that we tested Maybe even mailed along with this But this one is kind of a feature not a feature a Fascination based or a bullet based headline how Jin soaked raisins cured Carmen's hopeless arthritis now the Bullets also known as fascinations that are on the covers refer to things inside right because we're gonna we're gonna tell you in the In the first article you could see here We're gonna give you the answer to how they did that and how you can make them yourself the bullets on the inside like here in the article are bullets that refer to the book that refer to the book and You have to buy the book to find out what they are but here we just want to get them inside So these refer to things that are given away inside How a pickpocket can cure your back pain turn down your cholesterol This is on try to get some of everything right? allergies cellulite stomach trouble hair loss Inside 1714 kitchen cures and homegrown healing miracles that reverse disease and relieve pain While saving you time and money time tested and a hundred percent doctor approved in other words We had a doctor review these all yours to try free without sending a scent just see inside So that really just sums everything up right there and just in case they And and this kind of highlights the free gift here because everybody loves a free gift and then once you get inside the The format that I like to use And again, this can this can be used online or it can be used in a maga like this But what I like to do is really divide things into discrete sections so this first section is kind of the You can see from the second page because it's a spread right it's two pages So imagine this page in this page kind of side by side it's How gin soaked raisins cured carbons hopeless arthritis, so this is kind of the arthritis Spread joint pain thread spread. about hearing and I also included vision in there so Here's the Mediterranean healing wonder which is garlic and olive oil drops in the ear and Here's why it works and then you know your hearing and vision are so very precious any problem with them can be so frustrating That's why people through the years have developed so many effective natural remedies to protect these valuable gifts like these from healing remedies Then it talks about clearing up cataracts tinnitus night vision eye strain improve your hearing All those things go together now, of course these are a lot more you have a little more freedom when you're promoting the things in a book then you do if you're promoting a supplement and you can't talk quite so quite so much about curing and Things like that without running into regulatory problems Then we come to one of my favorite And again, this is kind of a smaller article the pickpocket cure for back pain That's one of my favorite, you know bullet headlines Because it took a very ordinary cure a very ordinary problem that People apparently were had these fat wallets especially men they were sitting on them it threw off their spines and They developed back pain and all you have to do is just stop having such a big thick wallet And your back pain may well go away And so I thought about well, how do I present this, you know take away your wallet make your back pain go away? see page 16 or you know, is it more Maybe something like you know why having a lot of money can cause back pain That would be another way to do it because when you have too much money and your wallet gets thick it throws off your back and you get back pain and Instead I thought also about like what do you think of when you think of back pain of wallets, right? You think of think of money you think of credit cards You think of maybe pickpockets, right stealing your wallet. So I thought hmm. Maybe there's some way to connect the two So if a pickpocket takes your wallet, then it takes away your back pain So the pickpocket cure for back pain. It's just a fun kind of really a fun way to To To do it to to deliver something which could otherwise be quite a little bit ordinary One thing to notice too is since I had these people one of the things I see a lot in Copy is that it has no personality behind it, right? It may maybe it's signed by someone maybe it says By the way, my name is, you know, Joe blow and I'm a you know expert trader and here's why you should listen to me But throughout it doesn't have a lot of the people behind it Whether that's the person writing it or the person that it's about So in this case, it wasn't the Wilens writing it But I tried to put as much of them as I could in it, right? So the Wilens love all the fan mail they get about their kitchen cures about how their kitchen chores have changed people's lives They especially like to hear about how a so-called Especially like hearing about how a cure worked on a so-called home hopeless case and So it brings them in and it also lets you know they get a lot of fan mail and they get a lot of people writing them Which is true. They get a lot of people writing them about how well their cures have have worked for them So that's why they were so pleased to hear from Miss Carmen Suarez of Stanford, Connecticut And then it goes into how of course she tried everything, but then she heard about Ginzo Grazins and she tried it now. Uh this morning Um tells a little bit about their background their aunt was an herbalist Their love affair with remedies continue with home remedies continues They became journalists so they can investigate the skills to uncover the best natural and folk remedies in the world Did their healing remedies really work well now's your chance to find to discover what all the excitement is about So I don't really say yes, they do work right a little too direct and head on and confrontational to say yes They work but to say you know now's your chance to see what all the sightings about see for yourself, right You and without again send no money without risking a dime This is the um Uh the bonus right and The bonus for anything whether it's a book or a supplement or a product or um You know a subscription You want it to go with the product in a certain way you want it maybe to have a dimension That the product doesn't have you don't want it to just be more of the same, right? So I didn't want this to just be more More of the same kinds of cures But I wanted I had the idea for these to be the really quick cures where it happens like instantly or overnight Um really gets rid of stuff fast.
